description_long: This is a round ceramic plate with a slightly scalloped rim and a shallow, wide basin. The front surface features intricate blue floral and bird motifs, reminiscent of traditional East Asian porcelain designs, set against a white background. The rim is decorated with additional blue patterns, while the back is plain with a subtle circular foot ring for stability. The plate has a glossy, smooth finish, indicating it is glazed, and the overall form is delicate yet sturdy. The object appears to be of medium size, suitable for serving food or as a decorative piece. There are no visible chips, cracks, or signs of heavy wear, suggesting it is in good condition.
description: A round, white ceramic plate with blue floral and bird motifs and a scalloped rim, finished with a glossy glaze. The front is ornately decorated, while the back is plain with a circular foot ring.
description_view_0: Front view showing detailed blue floral and bird motifs on a white background with a scalloped rim.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the plate's shallow depth and gently curved rim.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain surface with a circular foot ring and no decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the plate's thin, curved profile.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative blue floral and bird patterns are visible on the front surface and rim.
